mapper.insert: INSERT INTO move ( id, type_id, target_id, class_id, category_id, ailment_id, name, description, power, pp, accuracy, priority, effect_chance, ailment_chance, crit_rate, drain, flinch_chance, healing, max_hits, min_hits, max_turns, min_turns, stat_chance, generation ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{typeId}, #{targetId}, #{classId}, #{categoryId}, #{ailmentId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{power}, #{pp}, #{accuracy}, #{priority}, #{effectChance}, #{ailmentChance}, #{critRate}, #{drain}, #{flinchChance}, #{healing}, #{maxHits}, #{minHits}, #{maxTurns}, #{minTurns}, #{statChance}, #{generation} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE pp = VALUES(pp), priority = VALUES(priority)
INSERT INTO move_stat_change ( move_id, stat, `change` ) VALUES ( #{moveId}, #{stat}, #{change} )
